tooltip: Gene ID (as given in GFF file, 9th column, ID attribute)
label: Gene ID

tooltip: Contig ID
label: Contig ID

tooltip: Number of genes annotated on the contig
label: Contig gene count

tooltip: Contig length
label: Contig length

tooltip: Percentage of contig in the total assembly length
label: Contig % assembly length

tooltip: Percentage of contig in the total assembly length
label: Contig % assembly length

tooltip: Mean gene length on the contig
label: Contig gene length mean

tooltip: Standard deviation of the gene lengths in the set of genes annotated on the contig
label: Contig gene length SD

tooltip: Mean read coverage of the contig
label: Contig read coverage

tooltip: Standard deviation of read coverage along the contig
label: Contig read coverage SD

tooltip: Extent to which contig read coverage deviates from the mean assembly read coverage (in units of total assembly coverage SD)
label: Contig coverage deviation (assembly)

tooltip: Mean read coverage in the set of genes annotated on the contig
label: Contig gene coverage mean

tooltip: Standard deviation of the read coverage in the set of genes annotated on the contig
label: Contig gene coverage SD

tooltip: Pearson's correlation coefficient for the tetranucleotide-derived z-score vectors of the contig and the overall assembly
label: Contig 4-mer correlation (assembly)

tooltip: Probability (p-value) for two random sequences to show a correlation that is at least as high as the correlation between contig and overall assembly
label: Contig 4-mer correlation p-value (assembly)

tooltip: Percentage of GC content in the contig
label: Contig GC content

tooltip: Extent to which GC content of contig deviates from the mean assembly GC content (in units of total assembly GC SD)
label: Contig GC deviation (assembly)

tooltip: Gene length
label: Gene length

tooltip: Extent to which the gene length deviates from the corresponding mean along the contig (in units of contig gene lengths SD)
label: Gene length deviation (contig)

tooltip: Extent to which the gene length deviates from the mean gene length in the assembly (in units of overall gene lengths SD)
label: Gene length deviation (assembly)

tooltip: Absolute position of the gene on the contig (the closer to the contigs centre, the closer to 0; the closer to either contig end, the closer to 1)
label: Gene absolute position

tooltip: Classifier of terminal genes (1 if the gene is the last one at a contigs end, 0 if not)
label: Gene terminal flag

tooltip: Classifier of single genes (1 if the gene is the only gene annotated on the contig, 0 if not)
label: Gene single flag

tooltip: Mean read coverage of the gene
label: Gene read coverage

tooltip: Standard deviation of the read coverage along the gene
label: Gene read coverage SD

tooltip: Extent to which gene read coverage deviates from the corresponding mean along the contig (in units of contig gene coverge SD)
label: Gene coverage deviation (contig)

tooltip: Extent to which gene read coverage deviates from the average gene coverage in the assembly (in units of the coverage SD over the complete set of genes in this assembly)
label: Gene coverage deviation (assembly)

tooltip: Pearson's correlation coefficient for the tetranucleotide-derived z-score vectors of the gene and the overall assembly
label: Gene 4-mer correlation (assembly)

tooltip: Probability (p-value) of a random sequence to show a correlation with the overall assembly composition that is at least as high as the correlation between the gene and the assembly
label: Gene 4-mer correlation p-value (assembly)

tooltip: Pearson's correlation coefficient for the tetranucleotide-derived z-score vectors of the gene and its respective contig
label: Gene 4-mer correlation (contig)

tooltip: Probability (p-value) for two random sequences to show a correlation that is at least as high as the correlation between the gene and the contig
label: Gene 4-mer correlation p-value (contig)

tooltip: Percentage of GC content in the gene
label: Gene GC content

tooltip: Extent to which gene GC contig deviates from the mean gene GC content on the contig (in units of GC SD over the set of genes on the corresponding contig)
label: Gene GC deviation (contig)

tooltip: Extent to which the gene GC content deviates from the mean GC content in overall gene set (in units of GC SD over the complete set of genes in the assembly)
label: Gene GC deviation (assembly)

tooltip: Score (coordinate) of gene for Principal Component 1
label: PC 1

tooltip: Score (coordinate) of gene for Principal Component 2
label: PC 2

tooltip: Score (coordinate) of gene for Principal Component 3
label: PC 3

tooltip: Header of the protein sequence in the protein FASTA file
label: Protein sequence header

tooltip: Header of the protein sequence in the protein FASTA file cropped by the first whitespace (as done by DIAMOND)
label: DIAMOND query identifier

tooltip: Best sequence similarity hit in terms of bit score
label: Best hit

tooltip: NCBI Taxonomy ID of best hit
label: Best hit ID

tooltip: Percentage of identical matches between best hit and query sequence
label: Best hit % identity

tooltip: E-value of best hit
label: Best hit e-value

tooltip: Bit score of best hit
label: Best hit bit score

tooltip: Last common ancestor of all considered sequence similarity hits
label: LCA

tooltip: NCBI Taxonomy ID of LCA
label: LCA ID

tooltip: Refined LCA (LCA of target taxon and taxon clostest related to the target in the hit list)
label: refined LCA

tooltip: NCBI Taxonomy ID of refined LCA
label: refined LCA ID

tooltip: Taxonomic Assignment
label: Taxonomic assignment

tooltip: NCBI Taxonomy ID of TA
label: Taxonomic assignment ID

tooltip: The assignment of the gene is on the taxonomic lineage of the target organism
label: Target assignment

tooltip: Taxonomic label of the gene in the plot (might be a taxon at a higher rank than the actual taxonomic assignment)
label: Plot label

tooltip: NCBI Taxonomy ID of plot label taxon
label: Plot label ID

tooltip: Start position of the gene on contig
label: Gene start position (contig)

tooltip: End position of the gene on contig
label: Gene end position (contig)

tooltip: ID of the flanking gene upstream
label: Upstream gene ID

tooltip: ID of the flanking gene downstream
label: Downstream gene ID

tooltip: Biotype of the gene as denoted by the type column of the GFF
label: Gene biotype
